    SimpleTemplater
    To process simple HTML templates. -- Usage -- SimpleTemplater.getInstance().buildOutputUsingStringTemplate(template, parameters); Replaces ${parameter_name} in the template by its value found in the (Mapinvalid input: '<'String, Object>)parameters. -- Syntax -- Simple blocks can be processed.
